features.name: inout_wire_bidirectional_constant_and_hiz_drivers
features.description: Code should include an inout wire port driven by both a constant 1'b1 and high-impedance 1'bz assignment from different modules

features.name: reading_from_inout_wire_to_internal_wire
features.description: Code should include an internal wire that reads its value from an inout bidirectional wire
features.snippet:
inout wire data;
wire data_in = data;
